visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young man wearing a purple oversized t-shirt, purple shorts, a purple baseball cap, and white chunky sneakers is standing in an outdoor plaza at night. The area is decorated with red lanterns and colorful bunting. He is holding a smartphone with a patterned case, filming himself in a selfie style. (2) The man runs toward a large, red circular structure resembling a Poke Ball gate. The background shows city buildings and lights. He poses excitedly in front of the gate, making peace signs and pointing. (3) He moves to a gaming area under a white tent where a large screen displays a video game. He is seen holding a controller and interacting with the screen, which shows various Pokemon scenes. (4) He is at a merchandise counter looking at Pokemon-themed Nintendo Switch game cases. He holds a red case and a blue case, showing them to the camera. (5) The man plays a carnival-style game where he throws white balls at a 3x3 grid of numbered red targets. He is focused and energetic, celebrating when he hits the targets. (6) He poses with several large, illuminated Pokemon figures, including a purple and white Dragon-type Pokemon. He makes various poses and interacts with the camera. (7) He finds a woman wearing a striped shirt and a green Pokemon-themed sun visor. They talk animatedly and pose together in front of the Pokemon figures. (8) Wide shots of the event location at the Taipei 101 Water Dance Square are shown, featuring a giant inflatable Pikachu and other illuminated Pokemon characters.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: (尋找洪+0中). [Subtitle]: 欸老闆老闆. (2) [Subtitle]: 你有看到我老婆嗎. (3) [Subtitle]: 什麼東西啊, 你老婆你自己老婆自己管好, 關我什麼事啊. (4) [Subtitle]: 洪+0勒?. (5) [Variety]: (在紅色大門那?). [Subtitle]: 還是站在那個紅色大門那裡. (6) [Variety]: 紅色大門!!. [Subtitle]: 喔紅色大門!! (7) [Subtitle]: 拍一下!!拍一下!!拍一下!!快點快點!! (8) [Subtitle]: 沒有洪+0喔? (9) [Subtitle]: 先拍了, 來幫我拍一張. (10) [Subtitle]: 好帥好帥哦. (11) [Subtitle]: YA. (12) [Subtitle]: 大門沒有, 不然遊戲區啊. (13) [Subtitle]: 遊戲區嗎? 我玩然後你找, 快點快點. (14) [Subtitle]: 你看啊, 我360度這裡. (15) [Subtitle]: 我在找, 我在找. (16) [Variety]: 找到了 (寶貝球). [Subtitle]: 找到了. (17) [Variety]: 洪+0啦!!. [Subtitle]: 洪+0啦!!. (18) [Subtitle]: 我看有沒有撿到她. (19) [Subtitle]: 沒撿到沒撿到. (20) [Subtitle]: 啊這裡啦, 我問它. (21) [Subtitle]: 哪裡. (22) [Subtitle]: 有沒有看到洪+0. (23) [Subtitle]: 那個洪+0啊. (24) [Subtitle]: 啊不然買一片好了. (25) [Subtitle]: 這裡有在賣. (26) [Subtitle]: 先買你先買. (27) [Variety]: 來夜市遊戲攤位找?. (28) [Subtitle]: 這裡啦這裡. (29) [Subtitle]: 這過關搞不好洪+0就出來了. (30) [Subtitle]: 這只是你想玩, 老闆. (31) [Subtitle]: 沒有真的. (32) [Subtitle]: 5號啦有沒有. (33) [Subtitle]: 拜託這一個, 5號. (34) [Variety]: (成功連線). (35) [Subtitle]: 啊不是啊洪+0沒出來啊. (36) [Subtitle]: 耶過關. (37) [Subtitle]: 沒出來那玩下一關. (38) [Variety]: 晚上拍很帥欸!!! 拍照區啦. (39) [Subtitle]: 來幫我拍一張. (40) [Subtitle]: 我要找洪+0. (41) [Subtitle]: 快點拍照, YA. (42) [Variety]: 找到洪+0了?!. [Subtitle]: 嘿啦嘿啦. (43) [Subtitle]: 找到了嗎? 欸找你很久. (44) [Subtitle]: 你在這還幹嘛. (45) [Variety]: 《寶可夢傳說 Z-A》活動 只到明天. (46) [Subtitle]: 遊戲區有沒有去玩, 有. (47) [Subtitle]: 都拍了嗎都拍了嗎. (48) [Variety]: 還有超級快龍還沒拍. (49) [Subtitle]: 還有超級快龍還沒拍. (50) [Subtitle]: 你那個快閃店有沒有去買啊. (51) [Subtitle]: 還沒啦你又沒揪. (52) [Variety]: 還沒? 趕快啦!. [Subtitle]: 還沒? 趕快啦!. (53) [Subtitle]: 活動只到明天啦. (54) [Subtitle]: 趕快到台北101的水舞廣場, 參加寶可夢傳說Z-A的夜市祭. visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male host, 1 main female companion, and numerous staff and visitors in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main male host is wearing a matching purple t-shirt and shorts set, a purple cap, and white sneakers. The female companion wears a grey and white striped shirt and a green sun visor.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video is filmed at an outdoor night market event at the base of skyscrapers (Taipei 101 area). The setting includes festival decorations like red lanterns, festive bunting, branded tents, gaming monitors, merchandise stalls, and carnival games. Large glowing Pokemon sculptures are scattered throughout the plaza.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, high-energy male vocal greeting with rhythmic electronic pop BGM. Background ambient noise from a busy public event area. (2) Vocal pitch rises as the speaker shouts in excitement. Sound of heavy breathing and fast footsteps indicating running. (3) Electronic bleeps and UI sounds from a video game console are audible over the speech. (4) A percussive 'thud' and 'clink' sound as a game case is placed on a table. The speaker's tone remains cheerful and rapid. (5) Multiple sharp impact sounds in quick succession as plastic balls hit targets. A 'ding' SFX signifies a successful hit. (6) A female voice joins the dialogue, sounding equally energetic and slightly breathless. (7) BGM volume increases slightly as the speakers deliver a promotional message. (8) Transition sounds like 'whooshes' are used between rapid edits. The master track is bright and compressed for a mobile viewing experience.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a high-energy promotional vlog intended to build excitement and drive foot traffic to the 'Pokémon Legends: Z-A' Night Market event at Taipei 101. The creator uses a 'finding his wife' narrative hook to showcase various event features such as game trials, photo spots, and carnival games, concluding with an urgent call to action before the event ends.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly names the event, shows specific branded products (Nintendo Switch games), and includes a call to action at the end with official logos and event details.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video's fast-paced editing and variety-show style text overlays are characteristic of modern short-form social media content in Taiwan. The presence of Taipei 101 provides a recognizable local context for viewers.
